name: autonomous-finance
description: Re-export shim for the outcome-contract economic substrate — the source of truth now lives in business-as-code (subpath business-as-code/finance). This package re-exports Money/Cost/Card/Account/Ledger/Pricing/OutcomeContract/ProofPredicate/SLAPolicy/RefundContract/AuthorityBoundary + FinanceProvider/Merchant ports so existing importers keep compiling. Prefer importing from business-as-code/finance directly.
